paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 28 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 19 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 25 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 8. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. $23,784 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,857 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,281 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 3. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **21 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $23,277 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 6 overdue payments — schedule work is fine but material delays will hit soon if these aren't processed. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,222 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Ginger Brown:** **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $14,540 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 10 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 9 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

273 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **100 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 20 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$90,651 in payments going out this week** across 32 tasks — make sure funds are available. $21,177 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 10. This needs to turn around today.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 8 overdue — oldest first. 2 upcoming unassigned. 31 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 45 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 9. This needs to turn around today.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 7 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 4 overdue — oldest first. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 32 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. 2 payment tasks need Operations attention. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas has 1 overdue across 3 projects with 3 tasks active.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **23 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 38 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** Clean — 4 tasks in progress. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. 2 payment tasks need Operations attention. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 29 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
